setup_scripts.mcp_config:
#!/bin/bash
if [ -n "$SOURCEGRAPH_ACCESS_TOKEN" ] && [ -n "$SOURCEGRAPH_URL" ]; then
  mkdir -p /root/.config/claude
  cat > /root/.config/claude/mcp.json << 'MCPEOF'
{"mcpServers":{"sourcegraph":{"command":"npx","args":["-y","@sourcegraph/mcp-server"],"env":{"SRC_ACCESS_TOKEN":"$SOURCEGRAPH_ACCESS_TOKEN","SOURCEGRAPH_URL":"$SOURCEGRAPH_URL"}}}}
MCPEOF
fi
exit 0
